sidebar.no_labs_desc: Join an existing lab with an invite code, or create your own.

breadcrumb.navigate_to_desc: Select a page to navigate to.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.description: Your research data at a glance.

history.title: Activity History
history.description: Your recent views and likes across the vault.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account security and preferences.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Update your password. You'll need to enter your current password to confirm.
change_password.failed: Failed to change password, please try again

common.unauthorized: Your session has expired, please log in again

visibility.label: Visibility
visibility.dialog_desc: Choose who can access this document.

similar.title: Similar Documents
similar.description: Recommendations based on this document's content embedding.
similar.empty: No similar documents found in your library.
similar.unavailable: Recommendations will appear once enrichment completes.

mine.title: My Documents
mine.description: View and manage documents you have uploaded.
mine.empty: You haven't uploaded any documents yet.
mine.empty_hint: Upload your first document to get started.
mine.empty_filtered_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

edit_dialog.title: Edit metadata
edit_dialog.description: Update the title, publication year and DOI for this document.

delete.title: Delete document?
delete.description: "{name}" will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.

lab.title: Lab Documents
lab.description: Manage all documents shared in this lab. As the owner, you can edit metadata, restart enrichment, and delete any document.
lab.no_lab_hint: Select a lab from the sidebar to manage its documents.
lab.not_owner_hint: Only the owner of this lab can manage its documents.
lab.empty: This lab has no shared documents yet.
lab.empty_hint: Documents shared with the lab will appear here.
lab.empty_filtered_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

edit_dialog.title: Edit metadata
edit_dialog.description: Update the title, publication year and DOI for this document.

delete.title: Delete document?
delete.description: "{name}" will be permanently removed from this lab. This action cannot be undone.

upload.title: Upload Document
upload.description: Upload a scientific paper or document to your vault.
upload.file_placeholder: Select a file (PDF, TXT, Markdown, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX)
upload.visibility_private_hint: Only you can see this document
upload.visibility_lab_hint: All members of the selected lab can see it
upload.visibility_lab_no_labs: Join or create a lab first
upload.metadata_hint: Title, year, and DOI are all optional — our AI will automatically enrich the metadata after upload.

error.file_required: Please select a file to upload
error.invalid_type: Supported formats: PDF, TXT, Markdown, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX
error.too_many_files: You can upload at most {max} files at a time
error.failed: Failed to upload document, please try again

search.title: Semantic Search
search.description: Search across your documents using natural language.
search.no_results_hint: Try different keywords or check that your documents have been enriched.
search.no_lab_hint: Select a lab from the sidebar to include lab documents in search results.
search.history_empty: No recent searches yet. Try searching for something above.
search.history_clear_confirm_description: This will permanently delete your search history. This action cannot be undone.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Personalized for you, based on what you've liked, viewed, and searched.

empty.title: Nothing to recommend yet
empty.description: Like or view a few documents — and try a search or two — and we'll start tailoring suggestions for you here.

internal.network: Unable to connect to the server, please check your network or try again later
internal.502: The system service is upgrading or the backend is down (502 Bad Gateway), please try again later!
internal.504: Gateway timeout (504 Gateway Timeout), maybe the LLM processing is too slow, please wait patiently!

username.min: Username must be at least 3 characters
username.max: Username must be at most 20 characters
username.invalid: Username may only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

password.max: Password must be at most 50 characters

lab_dashboard.title: Lab Dashboard
lab_dashboard.coming_soon: Lab-level dashboard is coming soon. For now, head to "My Dashboard" for your personal overview.
lab_dashboard.no_lab_selected_desc: Select a lab from the sidebar or create/join one to get started.
lab_dashboard.leave_step1_desc: A confirmation code will be sent to your email.
lab_dashboard.leave_step2: Enter the verification code sent to your email

create.title: Create a Lab
create.description: Start a new lab and invite your team with a code.
create.desc_placeholder: What does this lab work on?

members.title: Lab Members
members.description: View and manage members of this lab.
members.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this lab?

settings.title: Lab Settings
settings.description: Manage lab configuration. Only the lab owner can perform these actions.

edit_info.title: Lab Info
edit_info.description: Update the lab's display name and description.
edit_info.description_placeholder: What does this lab work on?

settings.invite_code_desc: Share this code with others so they can join your lab.
settings.reset_invite_code_desc: This will invalidate the current invite code and generate a new one.
settings.reset_confirm: Are you sure? The old code will stop working immediately.
settings.transfer_desc: Transfer lab ownership to another member. You will become a regular member.
settings.transfer_confirm: Transfer ownership of this lab to {name}? This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_desc: Permanently delete this lab and remove all members. This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_step1_desc: A confirmation code will be sent to your email.
settings.delete_name_label: Type the lab name to confirm
settings.not_owner: Only the lab owner can access these settings.

join.title: Join a Lab
join.description: Enter an invite code to join an existing lab.

login.signin_desc: Sign in to your account with email or username.
login.join_us: Join us to access the workspace.
login.reset_password_desc: Enter your email address to reset your password.

hero.title: Your Intelligent
hero.subtitle: Upload scientific papers and let AI automatically extract metadata, generate summaries, and build semantic connections across your knowledge base.

features.title: Everything you need for research management
features.subtitle: Sci-Vault combines AI-powered enrichment with semantic search to help you organize and discover research effortlessly.

ai_enrichment.title: AI Metadata Enrichment
ai_enrichment.description: Upload a PDF and AI automatically extracts title, authors, publication year, DOI, and generates a concise summary.

vector_search.title: Semantic Discovery
vector_search.description: Find related papers using vector similarity search powered by pgvector and Google Gemini embeddings.

secure_storage.title: Secure Cloud Storage
secure_storage.description: All your documents stored securely with role-based access control and S3-compatible object storage.

step1.title: Upload
step1.description: Drop your PDF papers into the vault

step2.title: Enrich
step2.description: AI extracts metadata and generates vector embeddings

step3.title: Discover
step3.description: Search and explore your growing knowledge base

profile.title: Profile
profile.not_found_desc: This user hasn't set up their profile yet.
profile.empty_own_profile: You haven't set up your profile yet. Fill in the details below to get started.

labs.title: Labs
labs.description: Labs you are currently working in.
labs.empty: You haven't joined any labs yet.

error.avatar_too_large: Avatar must be smaller than 5 MB
